commands.review_summary:
The branch changes Matrix monitor draft progress so completed command output carries stable progress identity and adds a regression test for replacing stale failed command text.

PR surface: Source +2, Tests +66. Total +68 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live Matrix run in this review. Current main emits Matrix command completion as a plain progress string while the merge helper needs a structured id-carrying line to replace the earlier command item.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer-supplied real Matrix behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply right now.

target.title: fix(matrix): replace recovered command progress lines
target.body:
## Summary
- preserve Matrix command-output progress identity with item/tool call IDs so recovered command output updates the existing draft line
- prevent stale nested tool failures like `run openclaw cron -> run jq (agent) failed` from remaining visible after the command recovers
- add a Matrix monitor regression covering failed nested progress followed by completed command output

## Proof
- Non-PII Matrix behavior proof uses the Matrix monitor handler test harness with synthetic room/event IDs and the synthetic nested failure text `run openclaw cron -> run jq (agent) failed`; no live room IDs, user IDs, message IDs, cron names, or transcript content are included.
- Reproduction sequence in `extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts`: emit a failed command item with stable `itemId: command-1` / `toolCallId: call-1`, verify the Matrix draft initially contains `failed`, then emit recovered command output for the same IDs with `status: completed` / `exitCode: 0`.
- After the fix, the Matrix draft edit contains `completed` and explicitly no longer contains `failed` or `run openclaw cron -> run jq`; that proves the recovered command progress replaces the stale failed line instead of presenting it as a live failure.
- Focused proof command: `pnpm -s exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts -t "replaces recovered Matrix command progress"` — 1 passed, 113 skipped.
- Broader Matrix monitor proof: `pnpm -s exec vitest run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-matrix.config.ts extensions/matrix/src/matrix/monitor/handler.test.ts` — 114 passed.
- `git diff --check` passed.

## Why no live transcript
A live Matrix room transcript would expose private room/user/message metadata. The attached proof therefore uses a production Matrix handler regression with synthetic identifiers and the exact public-safe failure string needed to verify the behavior.
target.author: bdjben
